title: Sarvam Samvaad migration plan (research + decision doc)
description: Produce a decision-ready migration plan for moving the voice-calling agent from the custom VoiceLink+Sarvam stack to Sarvam Samvaad (Sarvam's managed conversational-voice platform, claims sub-500ms latency). Driver: sarvam-30b reasoning delay (~5-10s) is unacceptable on live calls and not disableable via public API. Deliverable: docs/samvaad-migration-plan.md. Must cover: (1) what Samvaad is + how to get access (user has dashboard.sarvam.ai; access may be gated behind a waitlist/sales form); (2) telephony integration options (keep VoiceLink DID + bridge WS audio into Samvaad, VoiceLink DID -> SIP forward, or switch to a Samvaad partner telco like Exotel/Ozonetel/Twilio/Plivo) and which one Samvaad actually supports; (3) which of our current code survives vs dies (conversation engine, VAD, barge-in, streaming TTS, fast-LLM bridge become dead weight if Samvaad owns the STT->LLM->TTS loop; dashboard, call store, agent config, VoiceLink webhook/outbound may survive); (4) porting the live agent config (mr-IN Marathi 'मराठी सहाय्यक', bulbul:v3/priya, system prompt); (5) cost + latency reality-check; (6) honest recommendation: full migration vs hybrid vs stay-on-custom+bridge. Ground every claim with a URL/doc; flag anything unverifiable; do NOT fabricate endpoints or pricing. Use mcp__sarvam__* tools and WebSearch/WebFetch on sarvam.ai / docs.sarvam.ai.
closeReason: Wrote docs/samvaad-migration-plan.md (commit 149cfb4): decision-ready Samvaad migration plan — access route (self-serve platform.sarvam.ai), telephony options analysis (native/Exotel vs SIP/PSTN forward, WS-bridge rejected), code survives/dies inventory, agent config porting map, sourced cost+latency reality-check with unverifiable claims flagged, and a two-track recommendation gated on 4 in-platform verifications. Tests 9/9, tsc clean.

title: fix-webhooks: VoiceLink webhook status mapping, custom params, call linking
closeReason: Fixed VoiceLink webhook bugs (scout findings 1-3, .overstory/specs/bug-voicelink.md): no-answer status mapping order, camelCase/snake_case/JSON-string custom_parameters + call_ref linking in findCall, 6h phone-match window for final events. Commit 5f62593; 7 new tests, all 16 pass; typecheck clean.
